checklist.question: Was a session MD file created at the correct path (docs/sessions/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md)?
Does the session MD contain frontmatter with date, branch, project, and tags fields?
Does 'What happened' use narrative prose (not bullet lists)?
Does 'Current state' describe specific progress (not vague descriptions like 'working on X')?
Were follow-ups routed to the daily note's Action Items (P0/P1) instead of dropped?
If skills were used this session, were non-stable skills graded and appended to learnings.md?
If memory was written, was it routed to a topic file (not dumped into MEMORY.md body)?
Did the session complete in under 3 minutes (no excessive report writing)?
Does the session summary preserve enough context (files changed, decisions made, open items) that a new session can pick up where this one left off?

scores.scenario: Research/conversation session, no code, product strategy
No git repo, no skills, pure conversation
